title: thymus arcticus
intro: Thymus arcticus, also known as creeping thyme, is a low-growing, spreading, and woody-based perennial herb native to arctic regions. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Thymus arcticus include its ability to soothe and calm the digestive system, reduce stress and anxiety, and exhibit antimicrobial properties that aid in wound healing and respiratory issues. Thymus arcticus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or essential oil, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
